name: MarineCal Plus
description: MarineCal Plus is an advanced formulation for bone building combining Aquamin™ Seaweed Calcium with Bioactive Silica, Chlorophyll, Sesame seeds & Zinc-Enriched Yeast. Aquamin™ is produced from organic calcareous marine algae harvested from the pristine waters of the North Atlantic.
benefits: Whole food calcium from organic seaweed
Builds stronger and more flexible bones
Alkaline-forming food which reduces body acidity
Improves strength and elasticity of bones and joints
Promotes healthy hair and nail growth

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet daily mixed in 125ml water or juice (below 50°C)
dosage.general: Mix 1 sachet in 125ml (1/2 cup) water or juice

who_can_consume: Adults concerned about bone health, osteoporosis prevention, or those needing calcium supplementation.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have kidney conditions.

qa.question: What makes MarineCal Plus different from other calcium supplements?
qa.answer: MarineCal Plus uses Aquamin™ from organic seaweed which provides not just calcium but also magnesium and over 70 trace minerals that work in harmony. The bioactive silica helps improve bone density and the alkaline-forming nature reduces body acidity.

qa.question: Who should take MarineCal Plus?
qa.answer: Anyone concerned about bone health, those at risk of osteoporosis, postmenopausal women, elderly individuals, and those wanting to support joint health and flexibility.
